name: @vizuaalog/bulmajs
description: Unofficial javascript extension to the awesome Bulma CSS framework.
author: Thomas Erbe <vizuaalog@gmail.com>

scripts.build: npm run build:lib && npm run build:types
scripts.build:types: npx tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir types-tmp && dts-bundle-generator -o dist/bulmajs.d.ts types-tmp/index.d.ts && rimraf types-tmp
